title: MGN 602 (M) Amendment 1 MLC substantial equivalence for crew accommodation for 200GT to <500GT
body: "This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping (Maritime Labour Convention) (minimum requirements for seafarers etc.) Regulations 2014 S.I 2014/1613, together with MGN 600 (M) which covers the inspections for coded vessels.  Amendment 1 updated references only.  Notice to   vessel owners operators and managers seafarers designers builders and surveyors.  "
